sftp.networkNote: LAN-only endpoint for this test server.

accessNotes.text: Your SFTP root includes /_Shared as a deletion-protected shared view.
Your SFTP root includes /_USB for external USB storage. It is writable but deletion-protected.
Your SFTP root includes /_Backups, a read-only view of encrypted backup repository files.

services.name: Photos
services.description: Photo and video library with private login and public share-link support.
services.uploadNotes: Upload through Immich web or the mobile app.

services.name: Files
services.description: Browser file workspace backed by each user's restricted SFTP root.
services.uploadNotes: Use Files for general uploads and app-specific media folders.

services.name: Videos
services.loginNotes: Jellyfin uses a generated local password. Ask an administrator for the initial password and change it after first login.
services.uploadNotes: Place movies under _Videos/_Movies and series under _Videos/_Shows.

services.name: Passwords
services.description: Shared password manager for server and account credentials.
services.loginNotes: Register with your local account email on first visit.
services.uploadNotes: Store Kanidm credentials, recovery codes, and app-local passwords here.

services.name: Local Backups
services.description: Kopia local backup management for system state and encrypted repositories.
services.loginNotes: Requires backup-admin plus the native Kopia password.
services.uploadNotes: Backup repository files are managed by Kopia.

services.name: Offline Media
services.description: Personal music and selected video folders synced offline to enrolled devices with Syncthing.
services.loginNotes: Use Kanidm on the homepage, then enroll your Syncthing device ID.
services.uploadNotes: Use _Music, _Videos/_YouTube, and _Videos/_Other in your personal files root.

adminGuide.title: Review evaluated config
adminGuide.detail: Read-only summary of generated hostnames, app surfaces, access groups, OAuth clients, storage paths, and required secrets. Start here before changing config.

adminGuide.title: Validate broad changes
adminGuide.detail: Run the broad validation gate and remote test activation after significant config, app, identity, routing, or storage changes.

adminGuide.title: Run routine guarded deploy
adminGuide.detail: Stage the repo archive on the server and run the normal remote nixos-rebuild test path. It does not switch the active generation.

adminGuide.title: Switch after a passing test
adminGuide.detail: Make the tested generation persistent using the guarded deploy helper. Run this only after the test path passes and failed units are understood.

adminGuide.title: Rotate or regenerate secrets
adminGuide.detail: Verify every manifest secret with the current identity. Use explicit fresh or rekey modes only when intentionally changing credentials or recipients.

adminGuide.title: Retrieve Jellyfin initial password
adminGuide.detail: Retrieve only the intended user's root-only initial credential, hand it over securely, and require an immediate password change.

adminGuide.title: Manage Kanidm entity removal explicitly
adminGuide.detail: Kanidm autoremove is disabled, so deleted module groups/users are kept for rescue safety. Mark stale provision entries intentionally before retiring a module or host.

adminGuide.title: Check backup timers
adminGuide.detail: Verify Kopia snapshots and offsite sync timers are scheduled and see their next run times.

adminGuide.title: Check service health
adminGuide.detail: List failed units after deploys or incidents. Follow up with status and logs for each named unit.
